SUBJECT:  How to get [insert service] for FREE? 



Hi [first name], 



You asked for a better incentive to invite friends to 

[insert store].  



We heard you loud and clear! 



With our new invite friends program, for every 

Referral you send you’ll get [insert % off].  So 

if you refer 10 friends, you’ll get [insert service] 

for FREE. 



It’s that easy!



We made it really easy to refer your friends by 

including tools, templates, emails, etc. you can 

use. 



Click here to start inviting your friends now. 



Sincerely, 



[insert name] 



P.S.  Think about it…within a matter of minutes

you could be getting [insert service] at no cost. 



It only takes an email, a tweet, or a Facebook 

post. Very little effort from you, but the payoff

could be huge. 



Get started today!
